name: Should I put “near me” keywords on my site for voice search?
description: Use “near me” phrases only when they sound natural and match real customer behavior. The bigger win is clear local relevance, not repeating the phrase everywher

mainEntity.name: Should I put “near me” keywords on my site for voice search?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if people genuinely ask those questions, because voice search favors natural language and local intent. The key is to use them sparingly and naturally, not stuff them into every sentence.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use “near me” phrases only when they sound natural and match real customer behavior. The bigger win is clear local relevance, not repeating the phrase everywhere.
